parameters.query:
SELECT 
    uc.contract_id,
    uc.contract_name,
    uc.detected_contract_type AS contract_type,
    uc.description,
    uc.status AS contract_status,
    uc.clause_count,
    uc.company_id,
    uc.uploaded_by_user_id AS initiator_user_id,
    uc.created_at AS contract_created_at,
    uc.updated_at AS contract_updated_at,
    -- v2.0: Contract type role fields
    uc.contract_type_key,
    uc.initiator_party_role,
    -- Get initiator info
    COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name, 'Initiator') AS initiator_name,
    u.email AS initiator_email,
    COALESCE(c.company_name, 'Company') AS initiator_company,
    -- Get respondent info from qc_recipients
    qr.recipient_email AS respondent_email,
    qr.recipient_name AS respondent_name,
    qr.recipient_company AS respondent_company,
    qr.status AS respondent_status,
    qr.first_viewed_at AS respondent_accessed_at
FROM uploaded_contracts uc
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = uc.uploaded_by_user_id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = uc.company_id
LEFT JOIN qc_recipients qr ON qr.quick_contract_id = uc.contract_id
WHERE uc.contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId }}'::uuid
LIMIT 1;

WITH clause_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_clauses,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE clarence_certified = true) AS certified_clauses,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_header = false) AS negotiable_clauses,
        ROUND(AVG(clarence_position)::numeric, 2) AS avg_clarence_position,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE clarence_fairness = 'balanced') AS balanced_count,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE clarence_fairness != 'balanced' AND clarence_fairness IS NOT NULL) AS review_needed_count
    FROM uploaded_contract_clauses
    WHERE contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId }}'::uuid
    AND is_header = false
)
SELECT 
    cs.*,
    -- Calculate agreement stats from events
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT clause_id) FROM qc_clause_events 
     WHERE contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId }}'::uuid 
     AND event_type = 'agreed') AS clauses_with_agreements,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT clause_id) FROM qc_clause_events 
     WHERE contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId }}'::uuid 
     AND event_type = 'queried' 
     AND clause_id NOT IN (
         SELECT clause_id FROM qc_clause_events 
         WHERE contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId }}'::uuid 
         AND event_type = 'query_resolved'
     )) AS pending_queries
FROM clause_stats cs;

SELECT 
    ucc.clause_id,
    ucc.clause_number,
    ucc.clause_name,
    ucc.category,
    SUBSTRING(ucc.content, 1, 500) AS clause_excerpt,
    ucc.clarence_certified,
    ucc.clarence_position,
    ucc.clarence_fairness,
    ucc.clarence_summary,
    ucc.clarence_assessment,
    ucc.clarence_flags,
    ucc.initiator_position,
    ucc.respondent_position,
    ucc.draft_text IS NOT NULL AS has_draft,
    CASE 
        WHEN ucc.initiator_position IS NOT NULL AND ucc.respondent_position IS NOT NULL 
        THEN ABS(ucc.initiator_position - ucc.respondent_position)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS position_gap,
    ucc.display_order,
    -- v2.0: Position labels from clause_range_mappings
    crm.range_data AS position_labels,
    crm.value_type,
    crm.range_unit
FROM uploaded_contract_clauses ucc
LEFT JOIN clause_range_mappings crm ON crm.clause_id = ucc.clause_id
WHERE ucc.contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId }}'::uuid
AND ucc.is_header = false
ORDER BY ucc.display_order;

SELECT 
    event_id,
    clause_id,
    event_type,
    party_role,
    user_name,
    message,
    activity_summary,
    event_data,
    created_at
FROM qc_clause_events
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId }}'::uuid
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
    message_id,
    sender_user_id,
    sender_name,
    sender_role,
    message_text,
    related_clause_id,
    related_clause_name,
    is_system_message,
    created_at
FROM qc_party_messages
WHERE contract_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId }}'::uuid
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 15;

SELECT 
    ucc.clause_id,
    ucc.clause_number,
    ucc.clause_name,
    ucc.category,
    ucc.content AS full_clause_text,
    ucc.original_text,
    ucc.clarence_certified,
    ucc.clarence_position,
    ucc.clarence_fairness,
    ucc.clarence_summary,
    ucc.clarence_assessment,
    ucc.clarence_flags,
    ucc.initiator_position,
    ucc.respondent_position,
    ucc.draft_text,
    ucc.extracted_value,
    ucc.extracted_unit,
    ucc.value_type,
    -- v2.0: Position labels for the focused clause
    crm.range_data AS position_labels,
    crm.value_type AS range_value_type,
    crm.range_unit
FROM uploaded_contract_clauses ucc
LEFT JOIN clause_range_mappings crm ON crm.clause_id = ucc.clause_id
WHERE ucc.clause_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.clauseId }}'::uuid;

SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    party_role,
    user_name,
    message,
    activity_summary,
    created_at
FROM qc_clause_events
WHERE clause_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.clauseId }}'::uuid
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    p.playbook_id,
    p.playbook_name,
    p.playbook_description,
    p.playbook_summary,
    p.contract_type,
    p.status,
    p.ai_confidence_score,
    p.rules_extracted,
    COALESCE(
        (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
            'rule_id', pr.rule_id,
            'clause_id', pr.clause_id,
            'clause_code', pr.clause_code,
            'clause_name', pr.clause_name,
            'category', pr.category,
            'ideal_position', pr.ideal_position,
            'minimum_position', pr.minimum_position,
            'maximum_position', pr.maximum_position,
            'fallback_position', pr.fallback_position,
            'rationale', pr.rationale,
            'negotiation_tips', pr.negotiation_tips,
            'talking_points', pr.talking_points,
            'escalation_trigger', pr.escalation_trigger,
            'importance_level', pr.importance_level,
            'is_deal_breaker', pr.is_deal_breaker,
            'is_non_negotiable', pr.is_non_negotiable
        ) ORDER BY pr.category, pr.display_order)
        FROM playbook_rules pr 
        WHERE pr.playbook_id = p.playbook_id
        AND pr.is_active = true
        LIMIT 15),
        '[]'::json
    ) AS active_rules
FROM company_playbooks p
WHERE p.company_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').first().json.viewerCompanyId }}'::uuid
AND p.is_active = true
LIMIT 1;
